title: Brain OS Decision
description: A strategic decision that persists across sessions — prevents reopening settled questions

decision.description: What was decided — one clear sentence

why.description: The real reason — constraint, insight, or principle

alternatives.description: Options that were considered and why they were rejected

chosen_direction.description: Which option was chosen and why in one sentence

proof_action.description: One concrete action that validates this decision

status.description: active = current, superseded = replaced by newer decision, archived = no longer relevant

superseded_by.description: ID of the decision that replaced this one, if superseded
